common.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

landing.headline: Build the CV That Gets You the Interview
landing.subtitle: DocuSmart helps professionals in Cameroon craft tailored, bilingual CVs with AI-powered writing—in minutes, not hours.
landing.howItWorksHeadline: From Profile to Perfect CV in 4 Steps
landing.step1Desc: Enter your education, experience, and skills once. DocuSmart stores everything so you never start from scratch.
landing.step2Desc: Tell us the role, company, and language. DocuSmart tailors every section to the specific job.
landing.step3Desc: Claude AI writes professional, impact-first bullet points and summaries—in French or English.
landing.step4Desc: Export a pixel-perfect PDF. ATS-optimised templates that pass automated screening.
landing.featuresHeadline: Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't
landing.feature1Desc: Fill in your details once. Generate unlimited tailored CVs from a single source of truth.
landing.feature2Desc: Claude AI transforms your raw experience into compelling, impact-first bullet points.
landing.feature3Desc: Native French and English support. Generate the same CV in both languages instantly.
landing.feature4Desc: ATS-optimised designs built for Cameroonian and international job markets.
landing.feature5Desc: MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money. No international card required.
landing.feature6Desc: Your data is encrypted and never sold. Delete your account anytime.
landing.faq1A: Yes. Your first CV is free forever with unlimited PDF downloads. Pro features like AI writing, multiple templates, and advanced customisation require a Pro subscription.
landing.faq2A: DocuSmart fully supports French and English. You can generate CVs in either language, or switch languages at any time.
landing.faq3A: We accept MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money—the two most popular mobile payment services in Cameroon. No international credit card needed.
landing.faq4Q: Can I create multiple document types?
landing.faq4A: Pro subscribers can create CVs, Cover Letters, Internship Letters, Professional Profiles, LinkedIn summaries, Recommendation Letters, and more.
landing.faq5A: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We follow GDPR-grade data protection practices and you can delete your account and all data at any time.
landing.faq6Q: Do generated CVs work with ATS systems?
landing.faq6A: All DocuSmart templates are built with ATS compatibility in mind—clean structure, standard fonts, and parseable layouts.
landing.ctaBannerHeadline: Start Your First Document Today — It's Free
landing.ctaBannerSub: No credit card. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
landing.footerTagline: Built for Cameroon. Ready for the world.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.cameroonianFormatHelp: Enables nationality, date of birth, place of birth, and marital status — commonly required for Cameroonian and French-style CVs
profile.referencesPrivacyNote: Reference contact details are never shared publicly. They appear only in documents you explicitly choose to include them in.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.deleteAccountDesc: All your profile data, documents, and settings will be permanently deleted after 14 days. This cannot be undone.
settings.deletionScheduled: Account deletion scheduled. You have 14 days to change your mind.
settings.profileLinkDesc: Share your profile and documents publicly with a custom link.
settings.usernameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.
settings.bioPlaceholder: e.g. Software Engineer · Yaoundé · Open to opportunities
settings.makeProfilePublicDesc: Anyone with your link can see your public profile.
settings.passwordChangeFailed: Failed to update password. Please check your current password.
settings.weeklyTipsDesc: Helpful tips on CV writing and job searching in Cameroon.
settings.productUpdatesDesc: New features, templates, and improvements to DocuSmart.
settings.profileRemindersDesc: Reminders to complete your profile and keep it up to date.
settings.deleteAccountWarning: Once deleted, all your data, documents, and subscription will be permanently removed after 14 days. This cannot be undone.

applications.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to Pro to log job applications, track their status on a Kanban board, and link them to your documents.

interview.title: Interview Coach
interview.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to Pro to access personalised interview questions generated from your CV.
interview.subtitle: AI-generated questions for
interview.intro: Practice these questions out loud before your interview. Click each to reveal a suggested answer strategy.
interview.disclaimer: Questions are AI-generated based on your document title. Tailor your answers to the specific company and role.
